zh.lifeSummary: William Drake Sr是Thomas Drake和Agnes Boteler的兒子，於1518年8月25日出生在英國艾可格亞特 沃爾坦。他和Joan Ann Marsham至少有9個兒子和13個女兒。他去世於1555年9月23日在英國英格蘭艾可懷特 諾特利享年37歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可懷特 諾特利聖 艾瑟爾崔達也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Drake
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English drake, either ‘drake, male duck’ (compare Duck ) or ‘dragon’ (Old English draca ‘snake, dragon’ or the cognate Old Norse draki), including an emblematic dragon on a flag (compare Dragon ). Both the Old English and the Old Norse forms are from Latin draco ‘snake, monster’; its sense as a nickname is unclear but it may have had the sense ‘standard bearer’. The name was taken to Ireland in the 13th century and reinforced by later English settlers in the 17th century.
German: from Low German drake ‘dragon’, familiar as image on signboards, hence a topographic or habitational name referring to a house or inn with such signboard.
Dutch: variant, mostly Americanized and Flemish, of Draak, a cognate of 2 above, from draak (Middle Dutch drake) ‘dragon’.

variants.name: Duck
meanings: Irish: adoption of the English name (see 1 above) as an equivalent of Lohan (an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Leocháin ‘descendant of Leochán’) by mistranslation, as if from lacha ‘duck’.
North German (also Dück) and German (Dück): see Dueck .

variants.name: Drakes
meanings: English: variant of Drake , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

English: habitational name from Drax (Yorkshire). The placename probably derives from Old English dræg ‘portage, place where boats are dragged’ or dræg ‘drag net’, influenced by Old Norse drag ‘portage’, with a plural drages being shortened to drags, Drax.
In some cases perhaps an Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) cognate in some other language.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: William Drake Sr was born on 25 August 1518, in Great Waltham, Essex, England as the son of Thomas Drake and Agnes Boteler. He had at least 9 sons and 13 daughters with Joan Ann Marsham. He died on 23 September 1555, in White Notley, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37, and was buried in St Etheldreda's Church, White Notley, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: William Drake Srは1518年8月25日にイギリスエセックスグレアト ワルサムでThomas DrakeとAgnes Botelerの息子として生まれた。彼はJoan Ann Marshamとの間に少なくとも9人の息子と13人の娘をもうけた。彼は1555年9月23日にイギリスイギリスエセックスウィト ノトリーで37歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスウィト ノトリースト エスエルドレダ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Etheldreda's Church, White Notley,: 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 휘트 노틀리 스트 테드러다'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: William Drake Sr(은)는 1518년 8월 25일 영국 에세스 그리트 월섬에서 Thomas Drake(와)과 Agnes Boteler의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Joan Ann Marsham(와)과 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1555년 9월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 휘트 노틀리에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 휘트 노틀리 스트 테드러다'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: William Drake Sr nasceu em 25 de agosto de 1518, em Great Waltham, Essex, Inglaterra filho de Thomas Drake e Agnes Boteler. Ele teve pelo menos 9 filhos e 13 filhas com Joan Ann Marsham. Ele faleceu em 23 de setembro de 1555, em White Notley, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em St Etheldreda's Church, White Notley, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint Etheldreda's Church, White Notley,: ст этелдреда'с чурч, уит нотли, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: William Drake Sr родился 25 августа 1518 г. в местности грит валтам, эссекс, Англия. Его родителей звали Thomas Drake и Agnes Boteler. У него было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 13 дочерей от Joan Ann Marsham. Он умер 23 сентября 1555 г. в местности уит нотли, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности ст этелдреда'с чурч, уит нотли, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: William Drake Sr nació el 25 de agosto de 1518, en Great Waltham, Essex, Inglaterra como hijo de Thomas Drake y Agnes Boteler. Tuvo por lo menos 9 hijos y 13 hijas con Joan Ann Marsham. Murió el 23 de septiembre de 1555, en White Notley, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en St Etheldreda's Church, White Notley, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
